The IOC summary shows no network activity, no persistence keys, and 200 files dropped. The process tree only shows the sample itself, and no mutexes were created. The dropped files are heavily focused

The dropped files are all .reg files and .bat files related to Far2 editor configuration (colors, macros). They are being classified as PE_EXE which is suspicious - .reg files should be text, not exec
